name: Funke
title: The Shackled

startingAbility.name: Wildfire
startingAbility.rawText: Blast a fireball at all enemies in Funke's range, dealing 175 (+200% Magic) damage and inflicting 15 (+66% Magic) Burn.

rankBSpecializations.name: The Stoked
rankBSpecializations.rawText: Mages gain 1 (+1 per rank) Magic whenever an enemy in their range takes Burn damage. Backup. Funke gains 1 Mana whenever an enemy in his range takes Burn damage.

rankBSpecializations.name: The Inferno
rankBSpecializations.rawText: Gain 2 Attack Range. At start of combat and after Stall (20), inflict 25 (+1 per 4 Magic) Burn on all enemies in range.

rankBSpecializations.name: The Detonator
rankBSpecializations.rawText: On cast, all enemies in range take 10 (+10 per rank) ticks of Burn damage.

quote: Let me do things my way.
